response:
Sec. 1  
people who are allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their immune system reacts to peanut proteins by releasing histamines which can cause severe allergic reactions such as anaphylaxis which is life threatening and underwater environments do not provide access to medical treatment or emergency interventions that are necessary to counteract such reactions  

Sec. 2  
additionally living underwater would require exposure to water which may contain various substances that could interact with the body in unpredictable ways and the absence of immediate medical care makes it even more dangerous for individuals with severe allergies to be in such an environment without proper precautions and equipment
